body: Every bounded sequence has a convergent subsequence. aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
A group is a set $G$ equipped with a binary operation $*$ that satisfies closure, associativity, identity, and invertibility.
For all $a, b, c in G$, the equation $(a * b) * c = a * (b * c)$ holds valid.
